health_conditions: computer use related upper extremity issues

benefits.description: Went from limping for 5.5 months to walking normally around neighborhood; bilateral leg/sciatic pain significantly reduced
Gut issues that were present from prior medications improved
Able to handle physical therapy workouts with more flexibility and pain tolerance
Issues with typing and operating computer became almost unnoticeable

protocol_notes: Started BPC 157 on September 2, 2022. Injecting subcutaneously in belly fat area. Stopped taking Advil and painkillers at the same time. Also receiving massage therapy and physical therapy concurrently. Used two different providers with comparable results. Considering adding TB500 to stack. Located in Canada. Symptoms still flare up after bowel movements suggesting ongoing sacral/glute nerve irritation.
